name: Gorechosen of Dromm
inspire: After an Action step, if you have 8 or more blood tithe tokens, Inspire each friendly fighter.

reactions.name: The Blood Tithe
reactions.trigger: Immediately after damage is inflicted on a fighter
reactions.flavorText: Khorne cares not from whence the blood flows, only that it flows.

reactions.name: Brutal Reckoning
reactions.trigger: Immediately after an enemy fighter is slain
reactions.flavorText: Dromm demands the complete and final obliteration of the enemy.
reactions.rulesText: gain a number of blood tithe tokens equal to that fighter's Bounty characteristic.

abilities.name: Call of Blood
abilities.flavorText: As the fever of battle grows, warriors rush towards each other, overcome with a need for blood and violence.
abilities.rulesText: Use this in a Power step. Pick 2 fighters with no Move or Charge tokens. Push each fighter 1 hex so they are adjacent. You can discard 1 of your blood tithe tokens before each push. If you do, you can push that fighter 2 hexes instead. You can only use this ability once per game.

abilities.name: Enrage
abilities.flavorText: Once Khorne has claimed dominion over a place, few have the strength to deny his call to slaughter.
abilities.rulesText: Use this in a Power step. Discard 8 blood tithe tokens, then pick an enemy fighter. Your opponent resolves a Charge for that fighter. You can only use this ability once per game.

abilities.name: Final Frenzy
abilities.flavorText: Warriors of Khorne can ignore the most grievous of wounds in a frenzy of bloodletting.
abilities.rulesText: Use this immediately after damage is inflicted on a friendly fighter if that fighter would be slain. Discard any of your blood tithe tokens. Roll an Attack dice for each token discarded in this way. On any {icon:crit}, remove damage tokens from that fighter until they are vulnerable. That fighter is slain at the end of the battle round. You can only use this ability once per game.
